sources.title: Jean&Len Color Conditioner Pomegranate Rose
sources.evidence: Official product page identifies the product as Color Conditioner Pomegranate Rose, 300 ml, with pomegranate, rose extract and panthenol, and lists the current product price.

sources.title: dm Jean&Len Conditioner Colorglow Granatapfel Rose
sources.evidence: Retailer listing confirms the German product name, 300 ml size, brand, conditioner category, GTIN 4262401738883 and retailer sku 3086487.

sources.title: VivaVoss Jean&Len Conditioner Colorglow Granatapfel Rose ingredients
sources.evidence: Secondary product listing gives the ingredient list including panthenol, glycerin, sunflower seed oil, pomegranate extract, rose extract and conditioning agents; used only to support ingredient flags.

field_rationales.product.image_url: Final product image generated locally and approved by reviewer.
field_rationales.product.price_eur: The official Jean&Len page lists a 4.29 EUR product price at review time.
field_rationales.product.clean_name: Official and retailer pages identify the product as a Colorglow conditioner with Granatapfel/Rose variant.
field_rationales.product.category_key: The user submitted it as conditioner and both official and retailer pages categorize it as conditioner.
field_rationales.product.affiliate_link: The official Jean&Len product page is stable and purchase-capable.
field_rationales.product.canonical_brand: The submitted brand text has a typo; the official and retailer listings use Jean&Len.
field_rationales.product.purchase_link_status: The official Jean&Len page is available at review time.
field_rationales.category_specs.product_conditioner_specs: Product positioning is a color-care conditioner for softness, shine and combability; it is suitable as a normal-use conditioner for fine to normal hair rather than a heavy repair conditioner.
field_rationales.category_specs.product_conditioner_reran: Claims and ingredients suggest medium weight, low repair intensity, moisture/softness direction, humectants from panthenol/glycerin and oil-like conditioning from sunflower oil.
field_rationales.category_specs.product_conditioner_specs: Include fine hair because sources emphasize softness, shine and easier combability rather than a heavy mask-like repair profile.
Include normal hair because the product is a standard rinse-out conditioner for color-treated hair.
field_rationales.category_specs.product_conditioner_reran: Medium because it is a classic conditioner with conditioning agents and oil-like emollience, but not marketed as an intensive mask or very rich repair product.
Low because the product mainly promises color shine, smoothness and combability; damaged hair is listed as target hair type, but there is no strong bond or protein repair claim.
Humectants from panthenol/glycerin and oils from sunflower seed oil; no silicone flag because dm lists the product as silicone-free.
Moisture because product claims and ingredients point to softness, smoothness, panthenol, glycerin and botanical extracts.
field_rationales.category_specs.product_conditioner_specs: Use stretches_bounces because the product is moisture/softness oriented and not positioned as a protein-building repair conditioner.
Use stretches_bounces because claims point to smoothness, combability and shine rather than protein structure repair.

review.notes: Local dry-run test payload. Do not apply without final human approval.

sources.title: Syoss official product page
sources.evidence: Official Syoss page names Intense Volume Deep Caring Shampoo, with 3% Collagen-Lift-Complex, gentle wash for fine, flat hair, soft formula for everyday use, no weighing down, and up to 48h volume.

sources.title: dm product listing
sources.evidence: dm lists syoss Shampoo Intense Volume, 440 ml, price 3.95 EUR, available, GTIN 4015100860481, ideal for fine and flat hair, daily cleansing, volume effect, and ingredients.

field_rationales.identifiers[0]: dm lists GTIN 4015100860481 for this product.
field_rationales.product.image_url: Final product image generated locally and approved by reviewer.
field_rationales.product.price_eur: dm lists the 440 ml product at 3.95 EUR on the checked product page.
field_rationales.product.clean_name: After separating brand and line, the remaining product name is Shampoo; dm title is Shampoo Intense Volume and the official page is Intense Volume Deep Caring Shampoo.
field_rationales.product.category_key: The submission category is shampoo and both sources identify the item as shampoo.
field_rationales.product.product_line: The repeated range/variant signal is Intense Volume; keeping it as the product line avoids duplicating it in the clean product name.
field_rationales.product.affiliate_link: The dm product page is the German retailer page used for price, availability, GTIN, and purchase link.
field_rationales.product.canonical_brand: Both official Syoss/Henkel and dm use Syoss as the brand.
field_rationales.category_specs.scalp_route: Balanced is the package-level default route for the same reason as the row-level scalp_route.
field_rationales.product.purchase_link_status: dm product page was available and showed the product as deliverable during review.
field_rationales.category_specs.cleansing_intensity: Gentle is the package-level default intensity because both source pages emphasize mild/daily use rather than clarifying cleansing.
field_rationales.category_specs.product_shampoo_specs: Shampoo specs are inferred from source positioning: fine/flat hair, gentle wash, everyday use, no weighing down, and volume effect rather than scalp treatment.
Only fine hair is included because the official and dm copy specifically target fine, flat hair.
Set to balanced as the neutral scalp route because source claims are hair-volume focused, not scalp-condition focused.
Set to normal because the sources do not position it for dandruff, irritation, dry scalp, or oily/dehydrated scalp; the primary need is volume.
Set to gentle because official Syoss says gentle wash and soft formula for everyday use, and dm says it is suitable for daily cleansing.

review.notes: Prepared for human review; final approval still required before Supabase write.
